---
mode: agent
description: Onboard a project with business intelligence — generate mission, personas, capabilities, and product plan into knowledge/vision/
---

Read and follow the instructions in `commands/vision.md` exactly.

The input may be anything: bullet points, a paragraph, a full PRD excerpt, or stakeholder notes. All are valid.
Derive all content strictly from the input. Do not invent personas, capabilities, or goals that are not implied by what was provided.
If sections are thin, generate what you can and explicitly flag what needs more input.
Always ingest the generated files immediately after saving them.
